metadata.title: neuronest eCommerce — Smart. Seamless. Shopping.
metadata.description: Launch and grow your online store with neuronest eCommerce — a subscription-based platform where you manage one store and unlock more features as you upgrade.

hero.title: Build smarter stores.
hero.subtitle: neuronest eCommerce gives you one powerful online store with subscription plans that unlock more products, promotions, and customers as your business grows.

features.title: Everything your store needs
features.subtitle: Powerful tools designed for merchants, delightful experiences built for shoppers.

subscription.title: Subscription-Based Features
subscription.description: Manage one store and upgrade your plan to unlock higher limits for products, banners, promotions, deliveries, and customers.

payments.title: Secure Payments
payments.description: Accept secure online payments with real-time order tracking and automated receipts.

admin.title: Powerful Admin Dashboard
admin.description: Manage products, categories, orders, and customers with an intuitive admin dashboard.

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.description: Keep customers engaged with OTP verification, order updates, and real-time email notifications.

seo.title: SEO-Ready Storefront
seo.description: SEO-friendly product URLs, fast-loading pages, and an optimized shopping experience.

scalable.title: Reliable Platform
scalable.description: A secure, stable platform built to keep your store running smoothly as your business grows.

howItWorks.title: Launch in three simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: From setup to your first sale — neuronest makes it effortless.

create.title: Create Your Store
create.description: Set up your store in minutes and choose a subscription plan. Add your logo, configure your subdomain, and you're ready.

catalog.title: Build Your Catalog
catalog.description: Add products, categories, and brands within your plan limits. Upload images, set pricing, and organize your inventory with ease.

sell.title: Start Selling
sell.description: Your storefront goes live instantly. Customers browse, checkout securely, and you manage everything from one place.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: One store per account. Upgrade your plan to unlock more features and higher limits.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Ideal for new businesses launching their first online store.

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: For growing stores that need more catalog and marketing capacity.

business.name: Business
business.description: Full capacity for established stores with unlimited resources.

consultation.title: Book a free consultation
consultation.subtitle: Not sure which plan fits your business? Schedule a free consultation with our team and we'll help you get started.

steps.step1: Fill in your details and pick a preferred date
steps.step2: Our team reviews your request and confirms the session
steps.step3: Get personalized guidance on setting up your store

form.message: What would you like to discuss?
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your business and goals...
form.successMessage: Thank you! Our team will contact you shortly to confirm your free consultation.

cta.title: Ready to transform your commerce?
cta.subtitle: Join forward-thinking brands using neuronest eCommerce to deliver smart, seamless shopping experiences.
cta.note: No credit card required. Setup in under 10 minutes.

aboutPage.metaDescription: Learn about neuronest eCommerce — a smart platform that helps businesses create, manage, and grow online stores with ease.
aboutPage.title: About Us
paragraphs: neuronest eCommerce is a smart eCommerce platform designed to help businesses create, manage, and grow their online stores with ease.

Our goal is to make online selling simple, affordable, and accessible for businesses of all sizes. Whether you are starting a new online store or expanding an existing business, neuronest eCommerce provides the tools you need to manage products, orders, customers, and your digital business operations in one place.
We focus on building practical, user-friendly, and scalable solutions that help business owners save time, reduce technical difficulties, and sell more effectively online.

At neuronest eCommerce, we believe technology should support business growth without making things complicated. That is why our platform is built to be simple to use, reliable, and suitable for modern online businesses.
Our vision is to empower businesses with smart digital tools that make eCommerce easier, faster, and more efficient.

privacyPage.metaDescription: Read how neuronest eCommerce collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal information.
privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy

blocks.text: neuronest eCommerce ("we", "us", or "our") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information.

This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, disclose, and protect your information when you visit our website, create an account, subscribe to our services, book a consultation, or use our eCommerce platform.
By using neuronest eCommerce, you agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.
We may collect personal information that you provide directly to us, including:

items: Messages or inquiries submitted through forms
Consultation booking details, including preferred date, time, and message

blocks.text: We may also collect certain information automatically when you use our website or platform, including:
This information helps us improve our services, maintain security, and provide a better user experience.
We use the information we collect for the following purposes:

items: To create and manage user accounts
To provide, operate, and maintain our platform
To process subscriptions, payments, and billing
To respond to consultation requests and support inquiries
To send account, billing, security, and service-related notifications
To improve website performance and user experience
To monitor and prevent fraud, abuse, or security threats
To comply with legal and regulatory obligations
To send product updates or marketing communications where permitted by law

blocks.text: You may opt out of marketing communications where applicable, but we may still send important service-related messages.
If you subscribe to a paid plan, payment and billing information may be processed by third-party payment service providers.

We do not intentionally store full credit card or sensitive payment card details on our own servers. Payment information is handled by secure third-party payment processors according to their own privacy and security policies.
We may store limited billing-related information, such as payment status, invoice details, subscription plan, and transaction reference numbers, for account management and record-keeping purposes.
We may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to improve our website and platform.
Cookies may be used to:

items: Understand how users interact with our platform

blocks.text: You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings. However, some parts of the platform may not function properly if cookies are disabled.
We do not sell your personal information.
We may share your information with trusted third-party service providers who help us operate our business and platform, including:
These service providers are only allowed to use your information as necessary to provide services to us and are expected to protect your information.

We may also disclose your information if required to do so by law, regulation, legal process, or government request, or when necessary to protect our rights, users, platform, or the public from fraud, abuse, or security threats.
Some of our service providers may store or process data in countries outside your country of residence.
By using neuronest eCommerce, you understand that your information may be transferred to and processed in other countries where data protection laws may differ from those in your location.
We take reasonable steps to ensure that your personal information is handled securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy.
We keep your personal information only for as long as necessary for the purposes described in this Privacy Policy.
We may retain information for reasons such as:

items: Meeting legal, tax, accounting, or reporting requirements
Preventing fraud, abuse, or security incidents

blocks.text: When personal information is no longer required, we will delete, anonymize, or securely store it according to applicable requirements.
We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
These measures may include secure hosting, access controls, password protection, encryption where appropriate, monitoring, and regular security improvements.
However, no method of transmission over the internet or method of electronic storage is completely secure. Therefore, we cannot guarantee absolute security.
You are responsible for keeping your account login details confidential and using a strong password.
Depending on applicable law, you may have the right to:

items: Access the personal information we hold about you
Request deletion of your personal information
Withdraw consent where processing is based on consent
Request information about how your data is used

blocks.text: To exercise these rights, please contact us using the details provided in the "Contact Us" section.
We may need to verify your identity before responding to certain requests.
You may request deletion of your account by contacting us.

After receiving your request, we will take reasonable steps to delete or deactivate your account and personal information, unless we are required to keep certain information for legal, billing, security, or legitimate business purposes.
Some information may remain in backups or records for a limited period before being securely removed.
neuronest eCommerce is intended for business users and is not directed toward children.

We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that we have collected personal information from a child without appropriate consent, we will take steps to delete that information.
Our website or platform may contain links to third-party websites or services.
We are not responsible for the privacy practices, content, or security of third-party websites. We encourage users to read the privacy policies of any third-party websites they visit.
We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time.

When we make changes, we will update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. Any changes will be posted on this page, and continued use of our website or platform after changes are posted means you accept the updated Privacy Policy.
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, our data practices, or wish to exercise your privacy rights, you may contact us at:
You may also contact us through the consultation form available on our website.

termsPage.metaDescription: Review the terms and conditions for using the neuronest eCommerce website, platform, and services.
termsPage.title: Terms of Service

blocks.text: Welcome to neuronest eCommerce.
These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the neuronest eCommerce website, platform, services, and related features provided by neuronest eCommerce ("we", "us", or "our").
By accessing or using neuronest eCommerce, creating an account, subscribing to a plan, or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
If you do not agree with these Terms, you should not use our website or platform.
neuronest eCommerce provides tools and services that help businesses create, manage, and operate online stores.
Our services may include features such as:

items: Other related eCommerce tools and features

blocks.text: We may update, improve, modify, or remove features from time to time to improve our services.
To use certain features of neuronest eCommerce, you may need to create an account.
You agree to provide accurate, complete, and updated information when creating your account.
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login details, including your username, email, and password.
You are also responsible for all activities that occur under your account.
If you believe your account has been accessed without permission, you must contact us immediately.
By using neuronest eCommerce, you confirm that you have the legal ability to enter into these Terms.
If you are using our services on behalf of a business, company, or organization, you confirm that you have authority to accept these Terms on behalf of that business, company, or organization.
Some features of neuronest eCommerce may require a paid subscription.
By subscribing to a paid plan, you agree to pay the applicable fees for the selected plan.
Subscription fees, billing cycles, available features, and plan limits may be displayed on our website or communicated to you before purchase.
We may use third-party payment processors to handle payments securely.
You are responsible for providing accurate billing information and ensuring that payments are completed on time.
If payment fails, your access to paid features may be suspended, limited, or cancelled.
You may request to upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription according to the options available on our platform or by contacting us.
If you cancel your subscription, your access to paid features may continue until the end of the current billing period, unless otherwise stated.
After cancellation, some features, data, or services may no longer be available.

We reserve the right to change subscription plans, pricing, or features. If pricing changes apply to your active subscription, we will take reasonable steps to notify you before the changes take effect.
Payments made for subscriptions, services, or consultations may be non-refundable unless otherwise stated or required by applicable law.
Refund requests may be reviewed on a case-by-case basis.
We reserve the right to refuse a refund where services have already been provided, where platform access has already been used, or where the request does not meet our refund conditions.
You may upload, submit, or manage content through neuronest eCommerce, including product details, images, descriptions, business information, customer information, and other store-related content.
You retain ownership of the content you submit to the platform.
By using our platform, you grant us a limited right to store, process, display, and use your content only as necessary to provide and operate our services.
You are responsible for ensuring that your content is accurate, lawful, and does not violate the rights of others.
You agree not to use neuronest eCommerce for any unlawful, harmful, or abusive purpose.
You must not:

items: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
Upload false, misleading, illegal, harmful, or offensive content
Sell prohibited, illegal, counterfeit, or restricted products
Attempt to hack, disrupt, overload, or damage our platform
Access another user's account without permission
Copy, resell, or misuse our services without permission
Use the platform to send spam, phishing messages, or harmful content
Upload malware, viruses, or malicious code
Interfere with the security or performance of the platform

blocks.text: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms.
If you use neuronest eCommerce to operate an online store, you are responsible for your own business activities.
This includes:

items: Refunds and returns to your customers
Business licenses or approvals where required
Compliance with consumer protection and eCommerce laws

blocks.text: neuronest eCommerce provides platform tools, but we are not responsible for disputes between store owners and their customers unless specifically agreed otherwise.
We aim to keep neuronest eCommerce available and reliable.
However, we do not guarantee that the platform will always be available, uninterrupted, error-free, or secure.
Access may be affected by maintenance, updates, technical issues, third-party service failures, internet problems, or events outside our control.
We may suspend or restrict access temporarily to maintain or improve the platform.
neuronest eCommerce may integrate with or rely on third-party services, such as payment processors, hosting providers, analytics tools, email services, or delivery-related tools.
Your use of third-party services may be subject to their own terms and privacy policies.
We are not responsible for the actions, performance, availability, or policies of third-party services.
All rights, title, and interest in neuronest eCommerce, including our website, platform design, software, branding, logos, text, graphics, and related materials, belong to us or our licensors.
You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, lease, reverse engineer, or exploit any part of our platform without written permission.
Using neuronest eCommerce does not give you ownership of our intellectual property.
Your use of neuronest eCommerce is also governed by our Privacy Policy.
Please read our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, store, and protect your information.
We may suspend, restrict, or terminate your account if:

items: You fail to pay applicable fees
Your activity creates legal, security, or operational risk
We are required to do so by law
We discontinue the service or any part of it

blocks.text: You may stop using our services at any time.
After termination, your access to the platform may be removed, and some data may be deleted or retained according to our Privacy Policy and legal requirements.
neuronest eCommerce is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis.
We do not guarantee that the platform will meet every business need, generate sales, increase revenue, or operate without errors.
You are responsible for deciding whether our services are suitable for your business.
To the maximum extent permitted by law, we disclaim all warranties, whether express or implied, including warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
To the maximum extent permitted by law, neuronest eCommerce will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages.
This includes loss of profits, revenue, data, customers, business opportunities, goodwill, or platform access.

Our total liability for any claim related to the services will not exceed the amount you paid to us for the service during the period giving rise to the claim, unless applicable law requires otherwise.
You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless neuronest eCommerce from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, costs, or expenses arising from:

items: Your violation of any law or third-party rights

blocks.text: We may update these Terms from time to time.
When we make changes, we will update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page.
Continued use of neuronest eCommerce after changes are posted means you accept the updated Terms.
If you do not agree with the updated Terms, you should stop using the platform.
These Terms shall be governed by and interpreted according to the laws applicable in Sri Lanka, unless otherwise required by applicable law.
Any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of neuronest eCommerce shall be handled through the appropriate courts or dispute resolution processes available under applicable law.
If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, you may contact us at:
You may also contact us through the consultation form available on our website.
